rejection.capacityExhausted: That column is at capacity. Try again when a slot frees up.
rejection.guardRejected: This move is not allowed by the workflow.
rejection.mergeBlocked: This task is blocked from completing until its merge step finishes.
rejection.unknownColumn: That column doesn't exist in this task's workflow.
rejection.workflowMismatch: Drag can't move a card between workflows. Use the workflow switcher instead.

anomaly.idInBothStorages: Task ID present in active and archived storage
anomaly.sequenceOverlap: Allocator next sequence overlaps an existing task ID
anomaly.unknownPrefix: Task row uses a prefix outside allocator state

missions.runHelperActive: Stopping pauses linked tasks and marks the mission blocked.
missions.runHelperBlocked: Resuming re-activates the mission and continues execution.
missions.runHelperPlanning: Starting activates the first slice so work can begin.

apiKeyPlaceholder.zai: Enter your Zhipu AI API key

apiKeySetup.fallback: Enter your API key for this provider.
apiKeySetup.kimiCoding: Create your API key in the Moonshot platform account settings.
apiKeySetup.minimax: Generate an API key from the MiniMax platform developer console.
apiKeySetup.ollama: Enter your Ollama endpoint URL (for example http://localhost:11434).
apiKeySetup.openai: Create an API key from your OpenAI dashboard under API keys.
apiKeySetup.openrouter: Create an API key from your OpenRouter account key management page.
apiKeySetup.zai: Create an API key in the Zhipu AI open platform account settings.

apiKeyUsage.fallback: Used by Fusion to authenticate requests to this provider

apiKeyUsage.minimax: Used for MiniMax models in task execution
apiKeyUsage.ollama: Connects to your local Ollama instance
apiKeyUsage.openai: Used for GPT models in task execution and planning
apiKeyUsage.openrouter: Routes to multiple AI model providers through a single key
apiKeyUsage.zai: Used for GLM models in task execution
